mano_cua.result_summary: Console确认nav ul和所有5个li元素的list-style-type均为'none'，视觉上未观察到圆点/方块等列表样式标记符号，导航栏水平排列正常。注意到部分nav项有矩形边框但可能是DevTools交互留下的focus ring。进程在step 65被SIGKILL终止
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Looking at the navigation bar at the top of the page. Navigation items (Preferences, Login, Register, Playlists, Feed) are horizontally arranged. Console confirmed list-style-type: 'none' for both ul and all 5 li elements. No traditional list markers (bullet points, circles, squares) observed before nav items. Noted rectangular borders around some nav items but could not definitively determine if these were focus rings from DevTools interaction or actual styling issues before process was killed.
